backend.changelog: The Stop button on the Generate progress bar is now always clickable while a run is in progress, so you can cancel a long or runaway Generate. (Pairs with CadBridge 1.8.58, which stops large assemblies from keeping every part open at once.)

cadBridge.changelog: Virtual components now export STEP and 3D PDF. A part that was 'Made Virtual' inside an assembly (stored within its parent rather than as its own file) was being skipped for STEP and 3D PDF, because it has no standalone file to open once the parent assembly is closed for those exports. Generate now resolves it from the persistent local cache copy, so its STEP and 3D PDF are produced like any other part. Thumbnails, drawings (PDF/DXF), and all non-virtual parts are unchanged. Pairs with backend 1.1.24.
